title: zanthoxylum ovatifoliolatum
intro: Zanthoxylum ovatifoliolatum, also known as the Chinese prickly ash, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, native to China. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Zanthoxylum ovatifoliolatum include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and relieve pain, making it a popular ingredient in traditional Chinese medicine. Herbal preparations of Zanthoxylum ovatifoliolatum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
